'''鈭歝h-w-j''' ('''chawaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhime|rhime]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-w-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhime|rhime]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-w-j
|-
! Lemma
| chawaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chawajithi|chawajithi]] || [[word:chawajiji|chawajiji]] || [[word:chawajishi|chawajishi]] || [[word:chawaji|chawaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawajuthuth|chawajuthuth]] || [[word:chawajujuj|chawajujuj]] || [[word:chawajushush|chawajushush]] || [[word:chawaj|chawaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawajuthu|chawajuthu]] || [[word:chawajuju|chawajuju]] || [[word:chawajushu|chawajushu]] || [[word:chawaju|chawaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawajufuth|chawajufuth]] || [[word:chawajufuj|chawajufuj]] || [[word:chawajufush|chawajufush]] || [[word:chawajuf|chawajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chawajethe|chawajethe]] || [[word:chawajeje|chawajeje]] || [[word:chawajeshe|chawajeshe]] || [[word:chawaje|chawaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawajothoth|chawajothoth]] || [[word:chawajojoj|chawajojoj]] || [[word:chawajoshosh|chawajoshosh]] || [[word:chawaj|chawaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawajotho|chawajotho]] || [[word:chawajojo|chawajojo]] || [[word:chawajosho|chawajosho]] || [[word:chawajo|chawajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawajofoth|chawajofoth]] || [[word:chawajofoj|chawajofoj]] || [[word:chawajofosh|chawajofosh]] || [[word:chawajof|chawajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chawaj忙th忙|chawaj忙th忙]] || [[word:chawaj忙j忙|chawaj忙j忙]] || [[word:chawaj忙sh忙|chawaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:chawaj忙|chawaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chawajathath|chawajathath]] || [[word:chawajajaj|chawajajaj]] || [[word:chawajashash|chawajashash]] || [[word:chawaj|chawaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chawajatha|chawajatha]] || [[word:chawajaja|chawajaja]] || [[word:chawajasha|chawajasha]] || [[word:chawaja|chawaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chawajafath|chawajafath]] || [[word:chawajafaj|chawajafaj]] || [[word:chawajafash|chawajafash]] || [[word:chawajaf|chawajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chawajasha|chawajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochawajasha|gochawajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichawajasha|gokichawajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chawajn眉sha|chawajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochawajnkn眉sha|gochawajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichawajn眉sha|gokichawajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chawajsh毛sha|chawajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochawajnksh毛sha|gochawajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichawajsh毛sha|gokichawajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chawajrosha|chawajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochawajnkrosha|gochawajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichawajrosha|gokichawajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chawajmusha|chawajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochawajnkmusha|gochawajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichawajmusha|gokichawajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chawajsherasha|chawajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochawajnksherasha|gochawajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichawajsherasha|gokichawajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chawajngasha|chawajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochawajnkngasha|gochawajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichawajngasha|gokichawajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chawajyasha|chawajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochawajnkyasha|gochawajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichawajyasha|gokichawajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chawajyamasha|chawajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochawajnkyamasha|gochawajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichawajyamasha|gokichawajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chawajn眉sh毛sha|chawajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochawajnkn眉sh毛sha|gochawajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichawajn眉sh毛sha|gokichawajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chawajn眉rosha|chawajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochawajnkn眉rosha|gochawajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichawajn眉rosha|gokichawajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chawajn眉musha|chawajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochawajnkn眉musha|gochawajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichawajn眉musha|gokichawajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chawajsh毛n眉sha|chawajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochawajnksh毛n眉sha|gochawajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichawajsh毛n眉sha|gokichawajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chawajsh毛rosha|chawajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochawajnksh毛rosha|gochawajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichawajsh毛rosha|gokichawajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chawajsh毛musha|chawajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochawajnksh毛musha|gochawajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichawajsh毛musha|gokichawajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chawajron眉sha|chawajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochawajnkron眉sha|gochawajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichawajron眉sha|gokichawajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chawajrosh毛sha|chawajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochawajnkrosh毛sha|gochawajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichawajrosh毛sha|gokichawajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chawajromusha|chawajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochawajnkromusha|gochawajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichawajromusha|gokichawajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chawajmun眉sha|chawajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochawajnkmun眉sha|gochawajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichawajmun眉sha|gokichawajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chawajmush毛sha|chawajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochawajnkmush毛sha|gochawajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichawajmush毛sha|gokichawajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chawajmurosha|chawajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochawajnkmurosha|gochawajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichawajmurosha|gokichawajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chawaj|chawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙w忙j|ch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochawaj|hochawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙w忙j|hoch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochawaj|hohochawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙w忙j|hohoch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chawaj|n眉chawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙w忙j|n眉ch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chawaj|n眉n眉chawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙w忙j|n眉n眉ch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chawaj|n茂chawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙w忙j|n茂ch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chawaj|n茂n茂chawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙w忙j|n茂n茂ch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchawaj|luchawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙w忙j|luch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchawaj|luluchawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙w忙j|luluch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichawaj|lichawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙w忙j|lich忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichawaj|lilichawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙w忙j|lilich忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochawaj|kochawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙w忙j|koch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochawaj|kokochawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙w忙j|kokoch忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechawaj|kechawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙w忙j|kech忙w忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechawaj|kekechawaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙w忙j|kekech忙w忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
